## Definition of Done

- [ ] `npm ci` clean
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] App launches and the item's acceptance criteria demonstrably hold
- [ ] Diff contains only this item's scope
- [ ] Any new dependency is justified (MIT/Apache/BSD only)
